---
title: "get_premieres"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_premieres()`

Create Premiere Table

## Usage

```r
get_premieres(
  platform_name = "netflix",
  start_date,
  end_date,
  media_type = NULL
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `platform_name` | Character. Platform name (e.g., "netflix"). |
| `start_date` | Date/Character. Start of the date range. |
| `end_date` | Date/Character. End of the date range. |
| `media_type` | Character. "movie" or "tv" (optional). |

## Value

A tibble of upcoming premieres.

## Description

Fetches upcoming premiere dates from the FlixPatrol API.
